dataset.target_refresh_assumption: no Phase 4 restriction beyond the recorded DWM next-vblank target; fixed horizons are diagnostic only
dataset.normalization: fit on train only per feature family and target kind; frozen for validation/test
dataset.feature_leakage_rule: all features use poll/hook/DWM fields with elapsedMicroseconds <= anchor elapsedMicroseconds

fixed-16.667ms.target_role: diagnostic frame-period comparison only; not used for primary dwm-next-vblank model selection

fixed-33.333ms.target_role: diagnostic frame-period comparison only; not used for primary dwm-next-vblank model selection

selection.selection_metric: lowest validation mean Euclidean error; test was evaluated after selection only
selection.product_selection_scope: dwm-next-vblank only for this primary search; fixed horizons may be diagnostic/upper-bound analysis but do not replace the primary target

performance.timing_note: Single local run; GPU timings include data transfer and validation passes and are approximate.

recommendation.phase5: Run robustness checks for the best validation-supported gated hybrid and the best standalone learned model on dwm-next-vblank plus high-speed/high-acceleration/high-horizon slices across additional traces/devices.
recommendation.phase6: Distill the gated correction behavior into a cheap residual/tabular form before considering GRU deployment unless Phase 5 shows sequence models are materially more robust.
